mapper.select: SELECT * FROM gl_voucher WHERE voucher_no = #{voucherNo} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE gl_voucher SET status = 'audited', auditor_id = #{auditorId}, auditor_name = #{auditorName}, audit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE gl_voucher SET status = 'posted', post_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
